subject: Goomy — small round pale purple slug-like creature surrounded by green leaves
description: A small, round, gelatinous creature with a pale purple body sits amid lush green leaf growth. It has small antennae-like protrusions on its head and a soft, amorphous form. The surrounding foliage is dense and green. The creature has a placid, slightly droopy expression. The overall image has a quiet, nature-close feeling.
foreground: small round pale purple gelatinous creature with small antennae, surrounded by leaves
